must_fix.title: RerankConfig derives Debug without masking api_key
must_fix.suggestion: Custom Debug impl that masks api_key with '***'.

must_fix.title: Team config commandindex.toml may contain api_key committed to git
must_fix.suggestion: Validate that api_key is rejected in commandindex.toml, only allowed in config.local.toml or env vars.

should_fix.title: No file size limit on config reads
AppConfig Serialize could expose api_key
should_fix.suggestion: Remove Serialize from AppConfig, use #[serde(skip)] on api_key.

should_fix.title: No deny_unknown_fields on RawConfig structs
should_fix.suggestion: Add deny_unknown_fields or warn on unknown fields.

nice_to_have.title: Secret<String> wrapper type for api_key fields
TOML parse errors may leak content snippets
